description: Day-by-day mapping for the catechetical formation track. Each day has a plate reference (to book/catechism-in-pictures) and/or a list of Compendium of the Catechism citation ranges. plate=null means a Compendium-only day. compendium is a list of {start, end, label} entries; end is inclusive. The build script reads plate text/images from the sister book and renders Compendium ranges as citation list items. The program walks through the Compendium's 598 questions in order, anchored by the 68 plates of the Catechism in Pictures wherever the topics align; Compendium-only days fill the gaps the 1908 plates leave open.

title.en-US: Man's Capacity for God

label.en-US: Man's desire for God; knowledge of God by reason; how we speak of Him
label.pt-BR: O desejo de Deus no homem; o conhecimento de Deus pela razão; como falamos d'Ele

title.en-US: God Comes to Meet Man — Revelation
title.pt-BR: Deus vem ao encontro do homem — A Revelação

label.en-US: God's self-revelation; the stages from Adam to Christ; private revelations
label.pt-BR: A autorrevelação de Deus; as etapas de Adão a Cristo; as revelações privadas

title.en-US: How Revelation Is Handed On — Tradition, Scripture, Magisterium
